src/main/java/com/javatechie/dto/Course..general_idea: Add the @Builder annotation to the Course DTO to enable the builder pattern for object construction.

src/main/java/com/javatechie/service/Cou.general_idea: Replace empty list initialization with a pre-populated list of Course objects using List.of factory method.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the list of required tools to reflect the migration to Java 21 and the adoption of LocalStack for local development.
README.md.human_impl: Added Java21, Docker, Docker Compose, AWS Local, and SAM Local to the prerequisites list; removed Gradle/Maven as direct prerequisites.

README.md.general_idea: Added documentation for deploying and running the application on LocalStack using Docker Compose and samlocal.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Deploying and running on LocalStack' with commands for docker compose up, samlocal build, and samlocal deploy.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the use of Python's json.tool for formatting JSON output with jq in the documentation examples.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `| python -m json.tool` to `| jq` in curl command examples.

README.md.general_idea: Refined the project title and description to explicitly mention LocalStack support.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to 'spring-boot-lambda serverless API on Localstack' and updated intro text.

template.yml.general_idea: Add a CloudFormation output to expose the LocalStack endpoint URL for local development and testing.
template.yml.human_impl: Added 'LocalStackLambdaApiPing' output with Value using 'localhost.localstack.cloud:4566' domain.

template.yml.general_idea: Rename the existing CloudFormation output to distinguish the production AWS Cloud endpoint from the local one.
template.yml.human_impl: Renamed output key and Export Name from 'SpringBootLambdaApi' to 'CloudLambdaApi'.
